item.title: 马斯克：只有我和黄仁勋坐上了空军一号
item.guid: 马斯克：只有我和黄仁勋坐上了空军一号
item.description:
Tesla CEO Elon Musk posted on X yesterday, stating that he was traveling to Beijing aboard Air Force One, the US presidential plane. 特斯拉 CEO 埃隆 · 马斯克昨日在 X 发文称，正乘坐美国总统专机「空军一号」前往北京。

Regarding a previous post claiming that the total net worth of CEOs on Air Force One exceeded $20 trillion, Musk replied, 'Only me and Old Huang (Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang) are on Air Force One.' 对于此前有人发帖称空军一号上 CEO 们的总身价超过 20 万亿美元，马斯克回帖称「只有我和老黄（英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋）在空军一号上」。

It is worth noting that Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang was not on the initial list. According to Bloomberg, Trump personally called Huang to invite him on the morning of departure, and Huang rushed to the airport to board Air Force One during its refueling stop in Anchorage, Alaska. 值得关注的是，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋并不在最初名单之列。据彭博社报道，特朗普在出发当天早上亲自致电黄仁勋发出邀请，并在空军一号途经阿拉斯加安克雷奇加油期间，黄仁勋赶至机场登机。

🔗 Related reading: Manus in the Storm, Butterflies Still Flapping Their Wings 🔗 相关阅读： 风暴中的 Manus，蝴蝶还在扇动翅膀

item.title: MacBook Neo 推高销量，苹果笔记本一季度线上市占升至 13%
item.guid: MacBook-Neo-推高销量，苹果笔记本一季度线上市占升至-13%
item.description:
Yesterday, research firm Lotu Technology released data on China's online omni-channel laptop sales for the first quarter of 2026, showing that online omni-channel retail sales of laptops in China were 2.3 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 19.2%; sales revenue was 14.8 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 14.7%. 昨天，研究机构洛图科技发布 2026 年第一季度中国笔记本电脑线上全渠道销量数据显示，中国笔记本电脑线上全渠道零售销量为 230 万台，同比下降 19.2%；销额为 148 亿元，同比下降 14.7%。

Apple was the biggest highlight this quarter, with its sales share on mainstream online e-commerce platforms climbing to 13%, an increase of about 6 percentage points from the same period last year. The research report believes that the immediate hot sales of the MacBook Neo were a key driver for this market share jump. 苹果是本季度最大亮点，其在线上主流电商平台的销量份额攀升至 13%，较去年同期提升约 6 个百分点。研报认为，MacBook Neo 上市即热销，是份额跃升的关键推手。

In terms of brand landscape, the top five manufacturers collectively held a market share of 79.8%, an increase of 9 percentage points from the same period last year, indicating a further increase in market concentration. 品牌格局方面，前五大厂商合计市场份额达 79.8%，较去年同期提升 9 个百分点，市场集中度进一步提高。

item.title: 曝苹果探索将 AI Agent 引入 App Store
item.guid: 曝苹果探索将-AI-Agent-引入-App-Store
item.description:
According to The Information, Apple is exploring ways to introduce AI agents into the App Store, aiming to embrace industry trends while ensuring platform rules are maintained. 据《The Information》报道，苹果正在探索将 AI 智能体引入 App Store 的方案，以在把握行业趋势的同时，确保平台规则得到延续。

The report states that Apple's internal team is designing a new management mechanism, aiming to restrict AI agents' overstepping behavior, such as preventing them from unauthorized deletion of user emails, under the premise of ensuring privacy and security standards. 报道称，苹果内部团队正在设计一套新的管理机制，目标是在保障隐私与安全标准的前提下，约束智能体的越界行为，例如防止其擅自删除用户邮件等极端情形。

The commercial value of the App Store is a significant driving force behind Apple's push in this direction. According to app analytics firm Appfigures, Apple's global App Store commission revenue is estimated to reach approximately $50 billion this year, a year-on-year increase of about 20%. App Store 的商业价值是苹果推进这一方向的重要动因。据应用分析机构 Appfigures 估计，苹果今年 App Store 全球佣金收入约达 500 亿美元，同比增长约 20%。

Previously, Apple had repeatedly rejected 'vibe coding' tools from the App Store, citing policy violations. 此前，苹果已多次以违反政策为由，将「氛围编程」（vibe coding）工具拒于 App Store 之外。

item.title: 李想：L4 无人驾驶预计 2028 至 2029 年落地，需近万 TOPS 算力
item.guid: 李想：L4-无人驾驶预计-2028-至-2029-年落地，需近万-TOPS-算力
item.description:
In the 27th issue of 'Luo Yonghao's Crossroads' released yesterday, Li Xiang, founder of Li Auto, shared several views on autonomous driving, the AI industry, and the future car market. He stated that L4 autonomous driving is not expected to truly be implemented until 2028 or 2029. 在昨天发布的《罗永浩的十字路口》第 27 期中，理想汽车创始人李想分享了多项关于自动驾驶、AI 行业及未来用车市场的看法。他表示，L4 级无人驾驶预计要到 2028 年至 2029 年才能真正落地。

L4 autonomous driving requires 3D ViT, pre-trained models of the physical world, control systems faster than humans, and basically nearly 10,000 TOPS of computing power, which is likely to be available around 2028 or 2029.

Regarding whether the popularization of autonomous driving would reduce car purchasing demand, Li Xiang gave a negative answer. He drew an analogy between renting and buying a house: 针对无人驾驶普及后是否会减少购车需求的问题，李想给出了否定答案。他以租房与买房作类比：

Roads are limited, and there's no way to increase supply. When you need a car the most, the supply still won't be able to meet demand, because it's not determined by the supply of cars, but by the supply of roads.

Li Xiang believes that people who are usually unwilling to hire a full-time driver and value travel privacy will be more inclined to purchase their own vehicles at that time. 李想认为，那些平时不愿雇专职司机、又在意出行隐私的人，届时将更倾向于自购车辆。

item.title: 比亚迪回应推「车机屏幕小换大」服务
item.guid: 比亚迪回应推「车机屏幕小换大」服务
item.description:
According to Jiupai News, BYD APP's official store recently launched a 'small to large car screen upgrade' service for 25 models, including Song PLUS, Song L, Qin L, and Yuan UP. 据九派新闻报道，近期比亚迪 APP 官方商城面向 25 款宋 PLUS、宋 L、秦 L、元 UP 等车型推出「车机屏幕小换大」的服务。

The relevant page shows that car owners can spend 1999 yuan to upgrade the original 12.8-inch screen to a 15.6-inch large screen; for the Yuan UP model, a service is offered for 1320 yuan to upgrade from a 10.1-inch screen to a 12.8-inch screen. 相关页面显示，车主可花费 1999 元，将原车搭载的 12.8 英寸屏幕升级为 15.6 英寸大屏；元 UP 车型提供售价为 1320 元的从 10.1 英寸屏幕升级至 12.8 英寸服务。

In response to the aforementioned service, BYD official staff stated that the pricing was determined by comprehensively referencing market conditions for similar upgrade products in the industry, the cost of original genuine screen materials, and standardized disassembly and assembly labor costs, while balancing market fairness and user experience perception. The service includes original large screen materials, professional standardized disassembly and assembly construction, and basic supporting installation services. 针对上述服务，比亚迪官方工作人员回应称，定价综合参考行业同类升级产品市场行情、原厂正品屏幕物料成本及标准化拆装工时成本制定，兼顾市场公允性与用户体验感知，服务包含原厂大屏物料、专业标准化拆装施工及基础配套安装服务。

Regarding safety, BYD stated that the screen upgrade adopts an original factory adaptation and installation solution, requiring no modification to the original vehicle's wiring or the existing structure of the center console, thus avoiding issues such as abnormal noise or sealing failure. 在安全性方面，比亚迪方面称，屏幕升级采用原厂适配安装方案，无需改动原车线路及中控台原有结构，不会产生异响、密封失效等问题。

After the upgrade, the functions of the vehicle system and the in-car interconnection experience remain unchanged and unaffected, and the official warranty rights of other original parts of the vehicle are not affected. 升级后，车机系统功能、车机互联体验均保持原有状态不受影响，不影响车辆原车其他零件的官方质保权益。

item.title: 蔚来全新 ES8 连续五个月夺大型 SUV 销冠，四月卖出 13020 台
item.guid: 蔚来全新-ES8-连续五个月夺大型-SUV-销冠，四月卖出-13020-台
item.description:
Recently, the Passenger Car Market Information Joint Council of the China Automobile Dealers Association released the latest market data, showing that NIO's new ES8 achieved retail sales of 13,020 units in April this year, winning the sales championship for five consecutive months in the large SUV segment and the market above 400,000 yuan. 近日，中国汽车流通协会乘用车市场信息联席分会发布了最新市场数据，显示蔚来全新 ES8 今年 4 月零售销量达 13020 台，在大型 SUV 级别及 40 万元以上市场连续五个月斩获销量冠军。

As of now, the cumulative number of users for the new ES8 has exceeded 100,000. It took 215 days from the start of delivery to complete the delivery of 100,000 new vehicles, setting a new sales and delivery record for high-end models priced above 400,000 yuan in the Chinese passenger car market. 截至目前，全新 ES8 累计用户数已超过 10 万，自开启交付起历时 215 天完成十万台新车交付，刷新了中国乘用车市场 40 万元以上高端车型的销售与交付纪录。

item.title: Charli xcx 成为 Nothing 首位全球品牌大使
item.guid: Charli-xcx-成为-Nothing-首位全球品牌大使
item.description:
Nothing announced yesterday that singer Charli xcx has officially become the company's first global brand ambassador, and the two parties simultaneously released a global creative advertisement. Nothing 昨日宣布，歌手 Charli xcx 正式成为公司首位全球品牌大使，双方同步发一支全球创意广告。

Charli xcx joins Nothing as a shareholder this time, alongside The Weeknd, Casey Neistat, and Swedish House Mafia, as part of the company's global cultural leaders lineup. Charli xcx 此次以股东身份加入 Nothing，与 The Weeknd、Casey Neistat、Swedish House Mafia 同列公司全球文化引领者阵容。

item.title: 腾讯 Q1 营收 1964.6 亿元，马化腾称去年「上了漏水的船」
item.guid: 腾讯-Q1-营收-1964.6-亿元，马化腾称去年「上了漏水的船」
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent disclosed its first-quarter 2026 performance report, achieving revenue of 196.46 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 9.1%; net profit attributable to parent company (profit attributable to equity holders) was 58.1 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 21%; R&D investment was 22.5 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 19%. 昨天，腾讯披露 2026 年第一季度业绩报告，期内实现营收 1964.6 亿元，同比增长 9.1%；归母净利润（权益持有人应占盈利）581 亿元，同比增长 21%；研发投入 225 亿元，同比增长 19%。

The progress of AI products was the most anticipated highlight of this quarter. Tencent's new model, Hy3 preview, launched after the reconstruction of Hunyuan, has topped the weekly overall ranking on the OpenRouter platform for three consecutive weeks from April 27 to May 11. WorkBuddy's monthly visits and month-on-month growth rate ranked first in the domestic PC-side AI-native office intelligent agent market. AI 产品进展是本季度最受关注的亮点。腾讯混元重建后推出的新模型 Hy3 preview，在 OpenRouter 平台自 4 月 27 日至 5 月 11 日已连续三周登顶周榜总榜、WorkBuddy 月访问量及环比增速居国内 PC 端 AI 原生办公智能体市场首位。

According to reports from National Business Daily, at the shareholders' meeting, Tencent Chairman and CEO Pony Ma responded to external doubts about whether Tencent's AI is lagging behind. 据每日经济新闻报道，在股东大会上，腾讯董事会主席兼 CEO 马化腾就外界关于腾讯 AI 是否落后的质疑作出回应。

He frankly admitted, "A year ago, we thought we were on board, but then we found the boat was leaking. Now we feel like we've stood up, but can't sit down yet, and still hope the boat can go a bit faster." He also stated that Tencent was not prominent in AI foundational capabilities in its early days, but has continuously made up for shortcomings through talent development and internal training in recent years. 他坦言，「原来一年前我们以为上了船，后来发现那个船漏水了，现在感觉站上去了，还坐不下去，还是希望船速能快一点」，并表示腾讯早期在 AI 基础能力方面并不突出，近年通过人才建设与内部培训持续补全短板。

Pony Ma also emphasized that Tencent's AI strategy must be built on its unique advantages, "We cannot just jump in and seize others' territory just because we see them doing it. We tried to do that in the past, but it mostly failed." 马化腾同时强调，腾讯的 AI 路线要结合自身独有优势稳扎稳打，「不能看着别人在那边做就随便跨过去，抢别人的地盘，过去我们也抢过但后来基本失败了」。

  • Gaming business performed steadily, with domestic market game revenue of 45.4 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 6%. Several evergreen games such as "Honor of Kings," "Peace Elite," and "Delta Force" achieved new quarterly highs in revenue; 游戏业务表现稳健，本土市场游戏收入 454 亿元，同比增长 6%，《王者荣耀》《和平精英》《三角洲行动》等多款长青游戏流水创季度新高；
  • International market game revenue was 18.8 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 13%; 国际市场游戏收入 188 亿元，同比增长 13%；
  • To B business (FinTech and enterprise services) revenue was 59.9 billion yuan, of which enterprise service revenue increased by 20% year-on-year, and Tencent Cloud's international business continued its strong growth; To B 业务（金融科技及企业服务）营收 599 亿元，其中企业服务收入同比增长 20%，腾讯云国际业务延续强劲增长；
  • On the user side, as of the end of March this year, the combined monthly active accounts for WeChat and WeChat were 1.432 billion, a year-on-year increase of 2%; QQ mobile monthly active users were 516 million, a year-on-year decrease of 3%. 用户侧，截至今年 3 月底，微信及 WeChat 合并月活账户数 14.32 亿，同比增长 2%；QQ 移动端月活 5.16 亿，同比下降 3%。

item.title: 阿里巴巴 2026 财年营收超 1.02 万亿元，云业务 AI 收入连续 11 季三位数增长
item.guid: 阿里巴巴-2026-财年营收超-1.02-万亿元，云业务-AI-收入连续-11-季三位数增长
item.description:
Alibaba Group yesterday released its Q4 and full-year results for fiscal year 2026: 阿里巴巴集团昨日发布 2026 财年 Q4 及全年业绩：

Quarterly revenue was 243.38 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 3%; full-year revenue was 1,023.67 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 3%; in this quarter, Alibaba Cloud's external commercialization revenue increased by 40% year-on-year, and AI **related product revenue share exceeded 30% for the first time**.

  • Alibaba China Commerce Group revenue was 122.22 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 6%, of which instant retail revenue was 19.988 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 57%; 阿里巴巴中国电商集团收入 1222.20 亿元，同比增长 6%，其中即时零售收入 199.88 亿元，同比增长 57%；
  • Alibaba International Digital Commerce Group (AIDC) revenue was 35.429 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 6%; 阿里国际数字商业集团（AIDC）收入 354.29 亿元，同比增长 6%；
  • Cloud Intelligence Group revenue was 41.626 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 38%, of which external commercialization revenue growth reached 40%; AI-related product revenue reached 8.971 billion yuan, achieving triple-digit year-on-year growth for the eleventh consecutive quarter. 云智能集团收入 416.26 亿元，同比增长 38%，其中外部商业化收入增速达 40%；AI 相关产品收入达 89.71 亿元，连续第十一个季度实现三位数同比增长。

At last night's earnings call, Alibaba CEO Eddie Wu announced that Alibaba AI has crossed the initial investment stage and officially entered the commercialization return cycle. Alibaba Cloud's external commercialization revenue is expected to continue accelerating beyond the 40% growth rate in the coming quarters, maintaining high growth in the medium to long term. 在昨晚的财报电话会上，阿里 CEO 吴泳铭宣布，阿里 AI 已跨越初期投入阶段，正式进入商业化回报周期。阿里云外部商业化收入预计未来几个季度将在 40% 增速基础上继续加速，中长期维持高速增长。

Wu Yongming also stated that the deployment of self-developed chips in Alibaba Cloud is still not large. However, in the future, there is hope to achieve full-stack self-development from GPU, CPU to storage and network chips. 吴泳铭还表示，自研芯片在阿里云的部署量还是不大。但未来有希望从 GPU、CPU 到存储、网络芯片实现全栈自研。

item.title: 泡泡玛特一季度整体收益同比增长 75% 至 80%，中国市场收入翻倍
item.guid: 泡泡玛特一季度整体收益同比增长-75%-至-80%，中国市场收入翻倍
item.description:
Yesterday, Pop Mart released its Q1 2026 business update announcement, with overall revenue growing by 75% to 80% year-on-year. The announcement did not disclose specific revenue figures or profit data, only the year-on-year growth rates of revenue by region and channel. By region: 昨天，泡泡玛特发布 2026 年第一季度业务更新公告，整体收益较去年同期增长 75% 至 80%。公告未披露具体营收金额及利润数据，仅披露各区域及渠道收益同比增速。分区域来看：

    China's revenue increased by 100% to 105% year-on-year;

    Asia-Pacific (referring to other Asian and Oceanian countries and regions outside China) increased by 25% to 30% year-on-year;

    The Americas increased by 55% to 60% year-on-year;

    Europe and other regions increased by 60% to 65% year-on-year.

Among the various channels in the Chinese market, offline channels grew by 75% to 80% year-on-year, while online channels grew by 150% to 155% year-on-year, with online growth significantly higher than offline. 中国市场各渠道中，线下渠道同比增长 75% 至 80%，线上渠道同比增长 150% 至 155%，线上增速显著高于线下。

item.title: 💡 李彦宏提出「日活智能体数 (DAA)」概念：未来全球 DAA 可能超过 100 亿
item.guid: 💡-李彦宏提出「日活智能体数-(DAA)」概念：未来全球-DAA-可能超过-100-亿
item.description:
Yesterday, at the Create2026 Baidu AI Developer Conference, Baidu founder Robin Li proposed a new 'metric' for the AI era — DAA (Daily Active Agents), and predicted that global DAA might exceed 10 billion in the future. 昨天，在 Create2026 百度 AI 开发者大会上，百度创始人李彦宏提出 AI 时代的新「度量衡」—— DAA（Daily Active Agents，日活智能体数），并预测未来全球 DAA 可能超过 100 亿。

Robin Li believes that tokens measure input and cost, but do not represent output and revenue, and do not necessarily represent the ultimate outcome; while DAA roughly corresponds to DAU (Daily Active Users) commonly used in the mobile internet era. 李彦宏认为，Token 衡量的是投入与成本，并不代表产出与收益，不一定代表终局；而 DAA 大致对应移动互联网时代通用的 DAU（日活用户数）。

To measure the prosperity of a platform and ecosystem, one should look at the DAA metric, focusing on how many Agents are working for humans and delivering results. This is closer to value and essence than meaningless token consumption.

Robin Li judged that the emergence of agents signifies that the development of AI is moving from the model stage to the application stage. 'For the first time, the protagonist of AI is not the model, but the application.' He views Chatbots and Agents as two types of entry points: 李彦宏判断，智能体出圈代表着 AI 的发展正从模型阶段走向应用阶段，「第一次，AI 的主角不是模型，而是应用」。他将 Chatbot 与 Agent 视为两类入口：

Chatbots represented by ChatGPT primarily solve 'information acquisition' problems, while Agents solve 'task completion' problems. The more complex the task and the higher its value, the higher the value ceiling for Agents compared to Chatbots. 以 ChatGPT 为代表的 Chatbot 主要解决「信息获取」问题，而 Agent 解决的是「任务完成」问题，任务越复杂、价值越高，Agent 的价值天花板高于 Chatbot。

item.title: 小米 17 Max 官宣：定位小米 17「全面升舱版」，本月发布
item.guid: 小米-17-Max-官宣：定位小米-17「全面升舱版」，本月发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi officially announced the Xiaomi 17 Max, positioned as 'a comprehensive upgrade of the Xiaomi 17', expected to be released this month. 昨天，小米官方正式公布了小米 17 Max，定位「小米 17 的全面升舱版」，预计本月发布。

Lu Weibing, Partner and President of Xiaomi Group, introduced that after receiving extensive user feedback requesting a 'large-screen version', the team decided to launch the Max model based on the Xiaomi 17, with comprehensive upgrades in four dimensions: imaging, screen, battery life, and performance. 小米集团合伙人、总裁卢伟冰介绍，团队在收到大量用户对「大屏版本」的需求反馈后，决定在小米 17 基础上推出 Max 机型，在影像、屏幕、续航、性能四个维度全面升级。

In terms of appearance, the Xiaomi 17 Max camera module adopts an all-black lens cluster design similar to the Xiaomi 15 series. It is expected to offer three color options: black, blue, and white, with the black version featuring a back cover material similar to dragon scale fiber. 外观方面，小米 17 Max 镜头模组采用了类似小米 15 系列的全黑镜组设计，预计提供黑、蓝、白三个配色，其中黑色版本会搭载类似龙鳞纤维的背盖材料。

item.title: 10490 元起，索尼 Xperia 1 VIII 正式发布
item.guid: 10490-元起，索尼-Xperia-1-VIII-正式发布
item.description:
Sony officially released its annual flagship smartphone, the Xperia 1 VIII, yesterday. First, let's look at the price: 索尼昨日正式发布年度旗舰手机 Xperia 1 VIII，先看价格：

The 12GB/256GB version is approximately 236,000 JPY, and the 16GB/1TB top-tier version is approximately 300,000 JPY; the starting price in the Hong Kong market is 12,099 HKD. Pre-order users will receive a pair of Sony WH-1000XM6 wireless headphones.

In terms of appearance, Sony no longer adheres to a small and exquisite design, and has also begun to shift towards a rugged style: adopting a new 'ORE' design language, inspired by raw stones and natural textures, offering four color options: black, silver, red, and gold. 外观方面，索尼没再坚持小而美的设计，也开始转向了粗旷风格：采用了全新的「ORE」设计语言，灵感源自原石与自然纹理，提供黑、银、红、金四款配色。

In terms of performance configuration, the Xperia 1 VIII is equipped with the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 mobile platform, features 16GB of RAM and up to 1TB of internal storage, and supports microSD card expansion up to 2TB. 性能配置上，Xperia 1 VIII 搭载骁龙 8 Elite Gen 5 移动平台，配备 16GB 运行内存及最高 1TB 内部存储，并支持最高 2TB 的 microSD 卡扩展。

Notably, the new phone still features a 3.5mm wired headphone jack and has upgraded full-range stereo speakers; it is equipped with XPERIA Intelligence, integrating BRAVIA display and WALKMAN audio technologies. 值得关注的是，新机依然配备 3.5mm 有线耳机接口，并升级了全频段立体声扬声器；搭载 XPERIA Intelligence，整合 BRAVIA 显示与 WALKMAN 音频技术。

In terms of imaging, the new machine is said to deeply integrate Sony Alpha camera technology, introducing a new "AI Camera Assistant" that can provide various expressive options and adjustment suggestions; the 70mm telephoto lens has been replaced with a new 1/1.56-inch sensor; the main camera is a 1/1.35-inch 48MP sensor. 影像方面，新机号称深度整合了索尼 Alpha 相机技术，引入了全新的「AI 相机助手」，可提供多种表现力选项与调整建议；70mm 长焦镜头则换用了一枚 1/1.56 英寸的新型传感器；主摄为 1/1.35 英寸的 48MP 传感器。

item.title: 31799 元，索尼发布 Alpha 7R VI 全画幅微单：6680 万像素、30 张/秒连拍
item.guid: 31799-元，索尼发布-Alpha-7R-VI-全画幅微单：6680-万像素、30-张/秒连拍
item.description:
Sony officially released its new generation full-frame mirrorless image quality flagship, the Alpha 7R VI, yesterday. It features an approximately 66.8-megapixel stacked full-frame image sensor, coupled with the new BIONZ XR2 image processor and a built-in AI processing unit. 索尼昨日正式发布新一代全画幅微单画质旗舰 Alpha 7R VI，搭载约 6680 万像素全堆栈式全画幅影像传感器，配合全新 BIONZ XR2 影像处理器与内置 AI 处理单元。

    Continuous shooting speed can reach up to approximately 30 frames/second, supporting 1-second RAW format pre-shooting, which can record images up to 1 second before the shutter is pressed;

    Supports 8.2K oversampled 8K 30p video recording, as well as full-frame uncropped 4K 60p and 4K 120p, with a color sampling rate of 4:2:2 10bit;

    Equipped with the latest Real-time Recognition AF+, featuring 759 phase-detection autofocus points covering approximately 94% of the image area, with low-light focusing performance down to EV-11. Subject recognition supports 7 types including humans, animals, birds, insects, cars/trains, and airplanes, as well as an automatic mode;

    The body dimensions are 132.7 × 96.9 × 82.9mm, with a weight of approximately 713g, slightly lighter than the previous generation's 723g.

Also released alongside the Alpha 7R VI is an FE 100-400mm F4.5 GM OSS lens, priced at 29,999 yuan, and will be available later this month. 与 Alpha 7R VI 一同发布的还有一颗 FE 100-400mm F4.5 GM OSS 镜头，售价 29999 元，本月下旬上市。

item.title: 13999 元，佳能发布 EOS R6 V 全画幅创作视频机
item.guid: 13999-元，佳能发布-EOS-R6-V-全画幅创作视频机
item.description:
Yesterday, Canon released the full-frame creative video camera EOS R6 V, which is Canon's fourth V-series camera after PowerShot V1, PowerShot V10, and EOS R50 V, and also the first model in the EOS R mirrorless series to feature a built-in active cooling fan. 昨天，佳能发布全画幅创作视频机 EOS R6 V，这是继 PowerShot V1、PowerShot V10 和 EOS R50 V 之后，佳能推出的第四款 V 系相机，也是 EOS R 专微系列中首款内置主动散热风扇的机型。

    Equipped with the same approximately 32.5-megapixel full-frame CMOS sensor as the EOS R6 Mark III and EOS C50, supporting Open Gate mode for up to 7K 30P video recording; also supports up to 4K 120P uncropped slow motion, Full HD 180P high frame rate shooting, and 3-second or 5-second pre-recording functions;

    The body features a built-in five-axis image stabilization system, offering up to 7.5 stops of compensation in the central area of the frame;

    Employs second-generation Dual Pixel CMOS AF technology, supporting tracking of humans, animals, and vehicles, offering 10 levels of AF acceleration/deceleration adjustment and 5 levels of subject switching sensitivity;

    For photos, it supports continuous shooting at up to approximately 40 frames/second with an electronic shutter, and offers a 0.5-second pre-shooting function;

    The body weighs approximately 688g, with external dimensions of about 141.8mm × 83.3mm × 79.7mm.

The suggested retail price for the EOS R6 V body is 13,999 yuan. The kit, bundled with the simultaneously released RF20-50mm F4 L IS USM PZ power zoom lens, has a suggested retail price of 21,199 yuan and is expected to go on sale in June this year. EOS R6 V 机身建议零售价为 13999 元，搭配同步发布的电动变焦镜头 RF20-50mm F4 L IS USM PZ 的套机建议零售价为 21199 元，预计今年 6 月上市销售。

item.title: 亚马逊整合 AI 购物功能，推出 Alexa for Shopping
item.guid: 亚马逊整合-AI-购物功能，推出-Alexa-for-Shopping
item.description:
Amazon officially launched Alexa for Shopping yesterday, integrating its AI assistant into the shopping platform. Alexa combines the product recommendation and shopping history features of the Rufus shopping assistant, as well as the previously introduced Alexa+ service. 亚马逊昨日正式推出 Alexa for Shopping，将旗下 AI 助手引入购物平台。Alexa 整合了 Rufus 购物助手的商品推荐与购物历史功能，以及此前推出的 Alexa+ 服务。

Amazon stated that the tool can answer users' shopping questions, compare products, and automatically arrange purchases when items drop to a specified price, without requiring a Prime membership. 亚马逊表示，该工具能够回答用户的购物问题、对比产品、并在商品降至指定价格时自动安排购买，无需 Prime 会员资格。

item.title: 小米开源自动驾驶大模型 Xiaomi OneVL
item.guid: 小米开源自动驾驶大模型-Xiaomi-OneVL
item.description:
Xiaomi yesterday released Xiaomi OneVL, a one-step latent space language-vision reasoning framework, which is the first to unify three technical routes—VLA, world models, and latent space reasoning—into a single framework. It is the first latent reasoning solution that surpasses explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) in accuracy and aligns with "answer-only" prediction in speed. 小米昨日发布一步式潜空间语言视觉推理框架 Xiaomi OneVL，率先将 VLA、世界模型与潜空间推理三条技术路线统一到同一框架中，是首个在精度上超越显式思维链（CoT）、在速度上对齐「仅答案」预测的潜在推理方案。

In terms of performance, the official disclosure states that OneVL achieved SOTA on three benchmarks: ROADWork, Impromptu, and Alpamayo-R1. Its PDM-score on NAVSIM reached 88.84, surpassing explicit CoT's 88.29 for the first time in latent space reasoning, with inference speed up to 2.3 times faster than explicit CoT. 性能方面，官方披露 OneVL 在 ROADWork、Impromptu、Alpamayo-R1 三项基准上达到 SOTA，NAVSIM 的 PDM-score 达到 88.84，首次在潜空间推理中超越显式 CoT 的 88.29，推理速度最高比显式 CoT 快 2.3 。

💻 GitHub: github.com/xiaomi-research/onevl 💻 GitHub: github.com/xiaomi-research/onevl

item.title: MiniMax Agent 升级为 Mavis
item.guid: MiniMax-Agent-升级为-Mavis
item.description:
MiniMax yesterday announced the upgrade of its Agent product and the adoption of a new name, Mavis, which stands for "MiniMax as a Jarvis." MiniMax 昨日宣布升级旗下 Agent 产品，并启用新名称 Mavis，取意「MiniMax as a Jarvis」。

MiniMax Agent desktop now supports multiple Agents working in parallel. Users can create Agents with different roles to form a team, collaborating to handle long-chain complex tasks that a single Agent would find difficult to accomplish. MiniMax Agent 桌面端现已支持多个 Agent 并行工作，用户可创建不同角色的 Agent 组成团队，协作处理单 Agent 难以胜任的长链路复杂任务。

The team consists of three types of roles: Leader, Worker, and Verifier. The Leader is responsible for task decomposition and scheduling, the Worker is responsible for specific execution, and the Verifier forms an adversarial relationship with the Worker, ensuring delivery quality through multiple iterations. 团队由 Leader、Worker、Verifier 三类角色构成：Leader 负责任务拆解与调度，Worker 负责具体执行，Verifier 与 Worker 形成对抗关系，通过多轮迭代把关交付质量。

The subscription system has been updated simultaneously. The original TokenPlan and Agent Plan have been merged into a single subscription, connecting CLI, API, and Agent ends, covering all models such as M2.7, music, video, and voice. Credits can be shared between Agent and API. 订阅体系同步更新，原 TokenPlan 与 Agent Plan 合并为一份订阅，打通 CLI、API 与 Agent 三端，覆盖 M2.7、音乐、视频、语音等全部模型，Credits 额度可在 Agent 与 API 之间共享。

🔗 Related reading: MiniMax launched Mavis, a veritable Agent "Three Departments and Six Ministries" 🔗 相关阅读： MiniMax 推出了 Mavis，活脱脱的 Agent「三省六部」

item.title: 面壁智能开源 MiniCPM-V 4.6
item.guid: 面壁智能开源-MiniCPM-V-4.6
item.description:
Yesterday, ModelBest officially released and open-sourced the 1.3B edge-side multimodal large model MiniCPM-V 4.6, offering two versions: Instruct and Thinking. 昨日，面壁智能正式发布并开源 1.3B 端侧多模态大模型 MiniCPM-V 4.6，提供 Instruct 与 Thinking 两个版本。

    Instruct Version: Designed for tasks such as general image-text understanding, STEM mathematical reasoning, document OCR, video temporal understanding, and object localization, surpassing Qwen3.5-0.8B and Gemma4-E2B-it;

    Thinking Version: Designed for advanced tasks such as multi-image relational reasoning and hallucination suppression, also leading competitors of the same size.

According to reports, MiniCPM-V 4.6's token throughput based on vLLM is 1.5 times that of Qwen3.5-0.8B, and its token consumption in AA evaluations is only about 1/19 of the latter's non-inference version; the first response delay for 3136² high-definition images is 75.7 ms, 2.2 times faster than Qwen3.5-0.8B. 据介绍，MiniCPM-V 4.6 基于 vLLM 的 token 吞吐量是 Qwen3.5-0.8B 的 1.5 倍，AA 评测中 token 消耗仅为后者非推理版本的约 1/19；3136² 高清图像首响延迟为 75.7 ms，较 Qwen3.5-0.8B 快 2.2 倍。

💻 GitHub: github.com/OpenBMB/MiniCPM-V 💻 GitHub: github.com/OpenBMB/MiniCPM-V

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-V-4.6 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-V-4.6

👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/models/OpenBMB/MiniCPM-V-4.6 👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/models/OpenBMB/MiniCPM-V-4.6

item.title: 以 Agent 为中心，百度智能云宣布全面升级新全栈 AI 云
item.guid: 以-Agent-为中心，百度智能云宣布全面升级新全栈-AI-云
item.description:
Yesterday, Baidu Group announced at the Create 2026 Baidu AI Developer Conference that Baidu AI Cloud will be fully upgraded to a new full-stack AI cloud for large-scale AI agent applications, focusing on two main lines: Agent Infra and AI Infra. 昨天，百度集团在 Create 2026 百度 AI 开发者大会上宣布，百度智能云将全面升级为面向大规模 AI 智能体应用的新全栈 AI 云，围绕 Agent Infra 与 AI Infra 两条主线展开。

    Agent Infra: The original "MaaS Model Service" has been upgraded to "Token Factory," with inference generation speed increased by approximately 25% compared to market levels, supporting calls to mainstream models such as Wenxin, DeepSeek, GLM, and MiniMax;

    AI Infra: KV Cache hit rate exceeds 90%, long-chain AI agent inference performance is 3 times higher than mainstream open-source community engines, and training efficiency leads the community by more than 1 time.

item.title: 蚂蚁灵波开源 LingBot-VLA 后训练工具链，150 条数据即可适配新机器人
item.guid: 蚂蚁灵波开源-LingBot-VLA-后训练工具链，150-条数据即可适配新机器人
item.description:
Yesterday, Lingbo Technology, a subsidiary of Ant Group, announced the full open-sourcing of the post-training toolchain for its embodied foundation model LingBot-VLA, covering four stages: data processing, training configuration, offline evaluation, and real-machine deployment. Development teams can use this to quickly migrate the model to their own robots. 昨天，蚂蚁集团旗下灵波科技宣布，全面开源具身基座模型 LingBot-VLA 的真机后训练工具链，覆盖数据处理、训练配置、离线评测和真机部署四个环节，开发团队可据此将模型快速迁移至自有机器人。

LingBot-VLA is pre-trained on 20,000 hours of real robot data, covering 9 mainstream dual-arm robot configurations. The official statement claims it outperforms the industry benchmark π0.5 in both real-machine and simulation evaluations. The model only requires 150 demonstration data points to complete task migration, achieving 1.5-2.8 times the training efficiency of mainstream frameworks like StarVLA and OpenPI. LingBot-VLA 基于 2 万小时真实机器人数据预训练，覆盖 9 种主流双臂机器人构型，官方称其在真机和仿真评测中均优于行业基准 π0.5。该模型仅需 150 条演示数据即可完成任务迁移，训练效率达 StarVLA、OpenPI 等主流框架的 1.5-2.8 倍。

💻 GitHub: github.com/Robbyant/lingbot-vla 💻 GitHub: github.com/Robbyant/lingbot-vla

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/robbyant/lingbot-vla-4b 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/robbyant/lingbot-vla-4b

item.title: 元宝上线聊天记录总结功能
item.guid: 元宝上线聊天记录总结功能
item.description: Tencent Yuanbao announced yesterday the launch of a WeChat chat history summary feature. Users can forward WeChat group chats or conversation content to the Yuanbao App to instantly complete intelligent summaries and analysis. The official notice advises users to upgrade WeChat and Yuanbao App to the latest versions to experience this feature. 腾讯元宝昨日宣布上线微信聊天记录总结功能，用户将微信群聊或对话内容转发至元宝 App，即可一键完成智能总结与分析。官方提示，体验该功能需将微信及元宝 App 升级至最新版本。

item.title: 星巴克携手周杰伦推出「真味无糖」系列饮品
item.guid: 星巴克携手周杰伦推出「真味无糖」系列饮品
item.description:
Starbucks China announced yesterday that it has teamed up with Jay Chou to launch two "True Flavor Sugar-Free" series beverages: a non-sweet vanilla flavored latte and a sugar-free sea salt caramel flavored Americano. Both parties also released lyric-themed hot and cold cups, themed tote bags, multiple limited-edition themed receipts, vinyl transparent cards, and tear-off strips as merchandise. 星巴克中国昨日宣布，携手周杰伦推出两款「真味无糖」系列饮品，分别为不甜的香草风味拿铁与无糖海盐焦糖风味美式，双方同时推出歌词款冷热杯、主题拎袋、多款主题限定小票、黑胶透卡及撕拉片等周边。

The "True Flavor Sugar-Free" series completely separates the flavor from the sugar in the original flavored syrups, allowing customers to choose their coffee's sweetness while retaining the flavor. Since its launch in April last year, over 15 million Starbucks members have tasted this series. 「真味无糖」系列将原有风味糖浆中的风味与糖分完全分离，让顾客可在保留风味的同时自主选择咖啡甜度。该系列自去年 4 月上市以来，已有超过 1500 万星巴克会员品尝。

item.title: 麦当劳 × 泡泡玛特推出星星人联名套餐
item.guid: 麦当劳-×-泡泡玛特推出星星人联名套餐
item.description:
McDonald's announced yesterday a collaboration with Pop Mart's IP "Starman," launching a joint event. From May 16th to May 17th, "Star Wish Tasting Sessions" will be held at select stores nationwide, inviting members to get an early taste of the co-branded new products. 麦当劳昨日宣布，与泡泡玛特旗下 IP「星星人」推出联名活动，将于 5 月 16 日至 5 月 17 日在全国部分门店举办「星愿品鉴会」，邀请会员抢先体验联名新品。

The core set meal for this tasting session is the "Star Wish Three-Piece Set," priced at 29 yuan. It includes one extra-long deep-sea cod burger, one Star Wish hash brown (seven pieces in total), and one Gulu Gulu orange-flavored jelly soda. 本次品鉴会的核心套餐为「星愿三件套」，售价 29 元，内含长长长深海鳕鱼堡一份、星愿薯饼一份（共七块）以及咕噜咕噜橘子风味冻冻汽水一杯。

The event adopts an offline in-store redemption method. Each session is approximately 1 hour, limited to 10 seats per session, with a national total of 39,000 sets, available on a first-come, first-served basis. 活动采用线下到店核销形式，每场约 1 小时，每场限 10 席，全国限量 39000 份，先到先得。

item.title: 喜剧片《绵羊侦探团》发布中文推广曲
item.guid: 喜剧片《绵羊侦探团》发布中文推广曲
item.description:
The comedy film "Sheep Detective Agency" recently released its Chinese promotional song, a "Yang Yang Yang" version of "Farewell" sung by Tengger. It uses the lyrics "Outside the long pavilion, by the ancient road" combined with a grassland flavor to introduce the film's story background. 喜剧电影《绵羊侦探团》近日发布中文推广曲，由腾格尔演唱「羊羊羊」版《送别》，以「长亭外古道边」搭配草原风味，引出影片故事背景。

The film tells the story of a group of sheep who decide to become detectives to solve the case after a shepherd mysteriously dies. It is scheduled to be released this Saturday. 该片讲述牧羊人神秘死去后，一群羊决定化身侦探破案的过程，定档本周六上映。

item.title: 《爱情城事》定档 5 月 20 日
item.guid: 《爱情城事》定档-5-月-20-日
item.description: "Love City Affairs" is scheduled to be released on May 20th. This ensemble romance film, set against an urban backdrop, connects different characters and emotional stories through the perspective of a newspaper delivery person. Rock singer Wu Bai's crossover performance as the newspaper delivery person is one of the film's most anticipated highlights. 《爱情城事》定档 5 月 20 日上映。这部以城市为背景的群像爱情电影，以一位派报员的视角串联起不同人物与情感故事。摇滚歌手伍佰此次跨界出演派报员一角，成为影片最受关注的看点之一。
